subcodes.title: Epistle to Muhammad Shah 2 (to Haji Mirza Aqasi?)
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who bestoweth wisdom upon whomsoever He willeth, and glorified be He above all that they ascribe unto Him. God knoweth, and the Lord beareth witness - and sufficient is He as witness - that I have committed no transgression warranting such a decree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسمه تبارک و تعالی. الحمد لله الذی یمن علی من یشاء بحکمه سبحانه و تعالی عما یصفون الله یعلم خداوند شاهد است بر حال من و کفی به شهیدا که ذنبی متحمل نشده ام که باعث چنین حکمی شده باشد
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment, @station of the Manifestation of God
